title: 理事長代理との出会い

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's been a few days since Director Akikawa left.
One day, shortly after I've sent
<chrname> off to do some endurance
running...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I spot a woman I've never seen before watching
the Umamusume training.

...You're the trainer of that girl who just took off
running around the grounds, aren't you?

I've been watching your training session. I
understand this is rather impolite to say upon our
first meeting, but...
You're horribly lax.

You permit her too much solo training, overlook
her tardiness, and allow her to chitchat idly with
others during her breaks.

Oh? Your expression suggests you don't agree
with my observations.

Then can you tell me how much she's sleeping on
the daily, and what the quality of her sleep is?
Are you checking in with her every day?

Lack of decent sleep not only worsens a runner's
performance but also invites accidents. It is
imperative to be aware of her sleeping habits.

I understand this academy values its students'
independence.
However, this way of thinking is irresponsible.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She directs her gaze over toward a mountain in
the distance.

Do you see that cedar-covered mountain? It's
popular with hikers during the climbing season.

You'll find magnificent trees that rustle in the
wind, birds that sing whole-heartedly, and mulch
that softly welcomes your feet.

But like most mountains in this country, it is only
that way due to external care and management.

Without any sort of outside interference, the
forests descend into decay. The sun doesn't reach
the floor, the grass dies, and the ground becomes
a graveyard of dead trees and rotting leaves.

Such unkempt mountains are more prone to
landslides and floods... This is why management is
so important.

You may feel like a kind and generous mentor,
watching passively over your students, but all
you're doing is leaving their potential to rot.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she speaks, the woman's gaze grows fierce.
The heavy atmosphere is beginning to feel
overwhelming, but just then...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
There you are! I was looking for you, Ms.
Kashimoto!

My apologies. I merely wished to observe a
typical training session.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Trainer! I see you've already met Director
Akikawa's temporary replacement.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
My name is Riko Kashimoto. I have been tasked
with managing the academy during my tenure.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: I... look forward to working with you.
